title: hemionitis intramarginalis
intro: Hemionitis intramarginalis, also known as the creeping hemionitis or creeping polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemionitis intramarginalis include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its rhizomes and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
